case_title: GORDON DREW VS KINGS COUNTY TRUCK LINES ATT.DAVID MARTIN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO DAVID MARTIN RETURNED SIGNED.
POS ON SUBPOENA TO SUSAN PHELAN, JONATHON MCGARRAH MARK BALLARD, SGT. MICHAEL WILLIAMS; FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORDON DREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KINGS COUNTY TRUCK LINES ATT.DAVID MARTIN $2,115.31 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,135.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
